description: Daily snapshot of every derived metric for every cohort wallet. OTS Bitcoin-anchored alongside audit_ledger digest in the L4 sequence (per CLAUDE.md TOP RULE 0 D5 · 2026-05-10). Backfillers cloning the formula cannot retroactively appear in the bitcoin chain · this file IS the moat for derived analytics.
verification: sha256 of sorted-keys json(metrics) == 397fdbffc71762123353682bd19a2952486e287e8e5f4f4d9a8060283f2f5410 · check via `python3 -c "import json,hashlib; d=json.load(open('data/derived_metrics_daily.json'));print(hashlib.sha256(json.dumps(d[\\"metrics\\"], sort_keys=True, separators=(\\",\\",\\":\\")).encode()).hexdigest())"`
